name: flint-chart-monorepo
description: Flint — semantic chart compiler for AI agents (JS + Python)

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/flint-js && npm run build -w packages/flint-mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:js && npm run typecheck:js && npm run typecheck:mcp
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/flint-js && npm run test -w packages/flint-mcp
scripts.test:all: npm run test:js && npm run test:mcp && npm run test:py
scripts.lint:py: cd packages/flint-py && uv run ruff check .
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run lint:py
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w packages/flint-js && npm run clean -w packages/flint-mcp
scripts.gen:reference: esbuild scripts/gen-chart-reference.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=scripts/.gen-chart-reference.mjs && node scripts/.gen-chart-reference.mjs && rm -f scripts/.gen-chart-reference.mjs
